1769898358487.instruction: PERFORMANCE: Make Vinci poll interval configurable via environment variable VINCI_POLL_MS (default 1500). Consider implementing event-driven variation generation using EventEmitter pattern instead of setInterval polling. Add backoff logic when no active Vinci tasks exist to reduce CPU usage.

variations.text: (Testing) Risks for: PERFORMANCE: Make Vinci poll interval configurable via environment variable VINCI_POLL_MS (default 1500). Consider implementing event-driven variation generation using EventEmitter pattern instead of setInterval polling. Add backoff logic when no active Vinci tasks exist to reduce CPU usage. | Shared-state races; unbounded output; unclear triggers; mitigations: separate state, caps, throttles, explicit enable flags.

(Wildcard) Acceptance for: PERFORMANCE: Make Vinci poll interval configurable via environment variable VINCI_POLL_MS (default 1500). Consider implementing event-driven variation generation using EventEmitter pattern instead of setInterval polling. Add backoff logic when no active Vinci tasks exist to reduce CPU usage. | Produces distinct variations; retrievable via API; emits lens events; bounded storage; compatible with existing task pipeline.
